summary: Phase 1 foundation update testing complete. Backend tests 100% pass (33/33). Frontend tests 100% pass (12/12). Auth flow now working correctly. All Phase 1 features (updated five core actions, win logic, expanded wormhole schema, interaction logging) verified.

issues: Console warning: shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow. (non-blocking)

seed_data_creation: Test user: test_unicorn_001@example.com already exists from iteration 1
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 1 foundation features tested and verified. Backend tests updated for new five_item_statuses keys (top_action, meditation, wormhole, distractions, plan_tomorrow), expanded wormhole contact schema with social media handles and leverage_categories, and interaction logging with action_type. Frontend auth flow now works correctly - users can login and are navigated to Today page. The Today page displays determination slider, five core actions, and status banner correctly.

phase1_features_verified.win_logic: Verified - priority_win if top_action done, unicorn_win if all 5 done
